title: Horminum viride
taxonomy: Horminum viride is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. This plant is native to Europe and Western Asia. It belongs to the genus Horminum, which is a small group of flowering plants. Horminum viride is often classified under the synonym Digitalis viridis. Additionally, it is sometimes grouped with the genus Digitalis, but the classification is still debated among botanists.
